title: phaseolus lathyroides var. hastifolius
intro: Phaseolus lathyroides var. hastifolius, also known as the flat-leaved stick bean, is a climbing legume native to tropical Asia, characterized by its flat leaves and twining stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phaseolus lathyroides var. hastifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
